description: This file contains React functional components for various UI primitives such as Card, DrilldownCard, Legend, BarChartLike, LineChartLike, PieChartLike, Gauge, SimpleTable, HeatmapGrid, and NetworkGraph. These components are designed for building a dashboard UI with visualization and layout elements.

methods.name: Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })
methods.description: A flexible, accessible card container component with optional header elements.

methods.name: DrilldownCard({ title, subtitle, children, roleBadge })
methods.description: A variant of Card that includes an export PNG button and snapshot reference for visual export.

methods.name: Legend({ items })
methods.description: Displays a simple legend with colored dots.

methods.name: BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 })
methods.description: A lightweight bar chart component render using divs.

methods.name: LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" })
methods.description: A sparkline-like bar chart component to indicate trends.

methods.name: PieChartLike({ parts })
methods.description: A radial pie/donut chart rendered with conic-gradient styled div and accompanying legend.

methods.name: Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" })
methods.description: A semicircular gauge visualization representing a value percentage.

methods.name: SimpleTable({ columns, rows, onRowClick })
methods.description: A basic scrollable table with customizable columns and row click handler.

methods.name: HeatmapGrid({ values, xLabels = [], yLabels = [], valueToColor })
methods.description: A simple heatmap grid visualization with customizable color mapping.

methods.name: NetworkGraph({ nodes, links })
methods.description: A lightweight network diagram using absolute-positioned nodes and SVG lines.

ctags.name: BarChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function BarChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#3b82f6", maxHeight = 140 }) {$/

ctags.name: Card
ctags.pattern: /^export function Card({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ title, subtitle, children, actions, roleBadge, ariaLabel })

ctags.name: DrilldownCard
ctags.pattern: /^export function DrilldownCard({ title, subtitle, children, roleBadge }) {$/

ctags.name: Gauge
ctags.pattern: /^export function Gauge({ value, max = 100, label = "Gauge", color = "#f59e0b" }) {$/

ctags.name: HeatmapGrid
ctags.pattern: /^export function HeatmapGrid({ values, xLabels = [], yLabels = [], valueToColor }) {$/

ctags.name: LineChartLike
ctags.pattern: /^export function LineChartLike({ data, xKey, yKey, color = "#10b981" }) {$/
